subcodes.first_line: O thou who art well-pleasing! In the blessed verse "Return thou, well-pleased and pleasing unto Him, and enter thou among My servants" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرضیه در ایه مبارکه فارجعی راضیه مرضیه و ادخلی فی عبادی
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
